# services.marytts

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.marytts`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.marytts.basePath` | `absolute path` | The base path in which MaryTTS runs. |
| `services.marytts.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MaryTTS. |
| `services.marytts.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the port in the firewall for MaryTTS. |
| `services.marytts.package` | `package` | The marytts package to use. |
| `services.marytts.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to bind the MaryTTS server to. |
| `services.marytts.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string, package, bool, int or float)` | Settings for MaryTTS. See the [default settings](https://github.com/marytts/marytts/blob/master/marytts-runtime/conf/marybase.config) for a list of possible keys. |
| `services.marytts.userDictionaries` | `list of absolute path` | Paths to the user dictionary files for MaryTTS. |
| `services.marytts.voices` | `list of absolute path` | Paths to the JAR files that contain additional voices for MaryTTS. Voices are automatically detected by MaryTTS, so there is no need to alter your config to make use of new voices. |
